glue.classifier.xmlclassifier.Classifica.Description: An identifier of the data format that the classifier matches.

glue.classifier.xmlclassifier.RowTag.Description: The XML tag designating the element that contains each record in an XML document being parsed. This can't identify a self-closing element (closed by `/>`). An empty row element that contains only attributes can be parsed as long as it ends with a closing tag (for example, `` is okay, but `` is not).
